  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],

  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The text mentions prior work (Corbett et al., 2012) but doesn't clearly articulate the delta of ChronoCommit compared to other systems like CockroachDB, SLOG, YugabyteDB, and TiDB.",
    "R1.7": "While the text cites Corbett et al., it lacks citations for production deployments of CockroachDB, YugabyteDB, and TiDB, as well as for SLOG.",
    "RX.1": "The text presents all claims as factual without explicitly stating uncertainties or areas where further evidence is needed.",
    "RX.3": "The text focuses on a specific workload (three regions) and doesn't explicitly state if it covers the full scope of potential use cases.",
    "RX.4": "No indication of harmful content or regressions is provided.",
    "RX.5": "There is no evidence of source tracing or justification for changes made in the text."
  },

  },
  "blockers": []

rationale.R1.4: The text mentions prior work (Corbett et al., 2012) but doesn't clearly articulate the delta of ChronoCommit compared to other systems like CockroachDB, SLOG, YugabyteDB, and TiDB.
rationale.R1.7: While the text cites Corbett et al., it lacks citations for production deployments of CockroachDB, YugabyteDB, and TiDB, as well as for SLOG.
rationale.RX.1: The text presents all claims as factual without explicitly stating uncertainties or areas where further evidence is needed.
rationale.RX.3: The text focuses on a specific workload (three regions) and doesn't explicitly state if it covers the full scope of potential use cases.
rationale.RX.4: No indication of harmful content or regressions is provided.
rationale.RX.5: There is no evidence of source tracing or justification for changes made in the text.
